name: Rabbit Livers in Puff Pastry
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out the puff pastry thinly and cut into rectangles measuring 9 cm by 1 cm.
2. Brush each rectangle with egg wash and bake until golden brown.
3. When cooked, slice each piece horizontally.
4. Wash and cut leeks into julienne strips.
5. In a large pan, sweat the leeks and one of the chopped shallots in butter over low heat. Season with salt, pepper, and cayenne pepper.
6. Add cream to the pan and simmer for 3 minutes to reduce the liquid.
7. Chop the rabbit livers and season with salt and pepper. Sauté them in clarified butter and the remaining shallot until lightly browned.
8. Deglaze the pan with cognac, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
9. Assemble each puff pastry rectangle by placing a layer of hot leeks and sautéed livers on top.
10. Garnish with chopped chives before serving.
